notes: Run was aborted after hitting Gemini free-tier rate limit (HTTP 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED).

The full Phase 27 Gemini sweep requires ~540 API calls (54 pairs × ~10 LLM calls each: JD enrichment + experience enrichment + project enrichment batch + skill-matcher validation gate + explanation polishing).
Free tier on gemini-2.5-flash is ~10 RPM / 1500 RPD — insufficient for a 54-pair sweep without throttling.
Gemini integration is verified independently via D1 (7/7 live_llm-marked tests passed in 73.93s on 2026-06-09). See tests/llm/test_*_live.py.
To complete the full 54-pair Gemini sweep, upgrade the API key tier and re-run: `python tests/phase27_validation.py --mode gemini`.

d1_evidence.description: Live Gemini integration validated by the 7 live_llm-marked tests (skipped by default unless GEMINI_API_KEY is set).
d1_evidence.result: all passed — Gemini 2.5 Flash auth, schema-validated responses, and graceful 4xx/timeout handling all confirmed end-to-end.
